name: Sliced Cucumbers in Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare and thinly slice cucumbers.
2. Place the sliced cucumbers in a small bowl.
3. Sprinkle with salt and stir to combine.
4. Let stand for 10 minutes.
5. In another small bowl, stir together yogurt, sugar, lemon juice, celery seeds, ground cumin, and pepper until well mixed.
6. Transfer the cucumber slices to a colander and rinse under cold water.
7. Squeeze out excess liquid using your hands.
8. Return the drained cucumbers to the mixing bowl.
9. Stir in the yogurt mixture thoroughly.
10. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Makes 4 servings. Per serving: calories - 27, protein - 1 g., fat - 0, carbohydrates - 5 g., cholesterol - 1 mg., sodium - 290 mg.
